problem: What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown
mechanism: Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion
hypothesis: If Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion is applied to universe, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.
